meta-spark.command.openRequestDumpsFolde: Meta Spark: Open Request Dumps Folder
meta-spark.walkthrough.title: Muse Spark 1.1 for Copilot Chat
meta-spark.walkthrough.description: Set up Muse Spark 1.1 in Copilot Chat.
meta-spark.walkthrough.setApiKey.title: Set your Meta API key
meta-spark.walkthrough.setApiKey.descrip:
[Get an API key](command:meta-spark.getApiKey) from dev.meta.ai.
[Set API Key](command:meta-spark.setApiKey)
meta-spark.walkthrough.showModels.title: Show Meta models
meta-spark.walkthrough.showModels.descri:
If the models are hidden, open VS Code's Language Models manager and show the Meta models.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage)
Customize base URL, model IDs, reasoning effort, and more in the extension settings.
[Open settings](command:meta-spark.openSettings)
meta-spark.config.title: Meta Spark Copilot
meta-spark.config.baseUrl.description: Meta API base URL. Defaults to official Meta API endpoint https://api.meta.ai/v1.
meta-spark.config.maxCompletionTokens.de: Maximum number of output tokens per request. Set to 0 to use the API default (no limit).
meta-spark.config.experimental.stabilize:
**Experimental**: improve prompt cache hit rate by pre-activating available tools.
- When the enabled tools list changes across turns, this may improve cache hit rate.
- Requests will include more function definitions, so input tokens may increase. Cache-hit input tokens are billed at a lower price.
- This may add internal preflight tool calls to the current Copilot chat history. If you switch to another model in the same conversation, that model provider may reject or mishandle the replayed history. Start a new chat if model switching behaves unexpectedly.

Use [Configure Tools](command:workbench.action.chat.configureTools) to **view and manage** your tool list.
meta-spark.config.debugMode.description:
Controls what diagnostic information Meta Spark writes. Token usage is always reported to Copilot regardless of this setting.

- **Minimal** — Token usage only. No diagnostic logs or request dumps.
- **Metadata** — Privacy-safe diagnostic metadata (request hashes, prefix overlap, tool schema changes). Does not contain prompt text — safe to share in public issue reports. View with [`Meta Spark: Show Logs`](command:meta-spark.showLogs).
- **Verbose** — Complete request payloads written to disk for local debugging. **Warning: contains sensitive prompt content.** View with [`Meta Spark: Open Request Dumps Folder`](command:meta-spark.openRequestDumpsFolder).
meta-spark.config.debugMode.minimal.desc: Token usage only. No diagnostic logs or dumps.
meta-spark.config.debugMode.metadata.des: Privacy-safe metadata. Safe to share publicly. View with `Meta Spark: Show Logs`.
meta-spark.config.debugMode.verbose.desc: ⚠️ Contains sensitive prompt content. For local debugging only.
meta-spark.config.modelIdOverrides.descr: Override the API model ID sent for each Meta model. Defaults are prefilled with official IDs; change them only when using a compatible third-party API that uses different model names.
meta-spark.config.modelIdOverrides.muse-: API model ID for Muse Spark 1.1
